title: Triceras tricuspidatum
taxonomy: Triceras tricuspidatum is a species of ammonite, which is a type of extinct cephalopod. The classification of Triceras tricuspidatum is within the family of Triceratidae and the order Ammonitida. Triceras tricuspidatum is a type of ammonite characterized by its distinctive tricuspid shell shape. Its classification also places it within the subclass Ammonitina. The classification of Triceras tricuspidatum is used to understand its evolutionary relationships and geological history.
